title: Missing docstrings
description: Functions, classes, and modules should have a documentation string (docstring).

noncompliant.code:
def add(x, y):
    return x + y

compliant.code:
def add(x, y):
        """Add two numbers together
        Args:
            x (int): The first number
            y (int): The second number
        Returns:
            int: The sum of the two numbers
        """
        return x + y

why_is_this_an_issue: Documentation helps others understand the purpose and usage of your code.
